subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabl-i-Káẓim! the servant in attendance hath appeared with the Book which thou didst send unto the Name of Bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل کاظم قد حضر العبد الحاضر بالکتاب الذی ارسلته الی اسم الجود
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
